title.es: Habitación Estándar con vista a los jardines en Playa Hermosa, Jacó
title.en: Standard Room with Garden View in Playa Hermosa de Jacó

desc.es: Habitación Estándar de 32 m² frente a los jardines en Playa Hermosa, para hasta cuatro huéspedes con dos camas dobles. A pasos de la piscina, el restaurante y la playa.
desc.en: 32 m² garden-facing Standard Room in Playa Hermosa for up to four guests, with two double beds. A short walk from the pool, restaurant and beach.

Standard Room

Your Tropical Escape Begins Here

Tropical garden view | Ground or upper floor

Capacity

4 persons

Size

32 m²

Beds

2 Double

Description

Surrounded by lush tropical gardens and just moments from the beach, our Standard Room offers the perfect blend of comfort, relaxation, and authentic Costa Rican charm.

Featuring two double beds and accommodations for up to four guests, these spacious rooms provide a peaceful retreat after a day spent exploring Playa Hermosa, lounging by the pool, or watching the sun set over the Pacific Ocean. Wake up to the sounds of tropical birds, stroll through swaying palms, and enjoy easy access to all of Terraza del Pacifico's amenities, including beachfront dining, our iconic illuminated pool, and one of Costa Rica's most beautiful beaches. Whether you're traveling with family, friends, or embarking on your next adventure, the Standard Room is your gateway to paradise.

Relax. Recharge. Experience Costa Rica.
